GRules.GeneralRules1: Tsar Treasures is a 5-reel (3 rows in reels 1 and 5, 4 rows in reels 2, 3 and 4) video slot featuring multipliers up to x15 and Treasure Egg symbols that transform into Wild symbols.

GeneralRules2.value: The game is played with 20 base bet for %{576} ways (fixed), bet level of %{minBetMtp} to %{maxBetMtp} and bet size of %{minChip} to %{maxChip}.
GeneralRules2.comment: %{minBetMtp}, %{maxBetMtp}, %{minChip}, %{maxChip} will be replaced with game specific configurations.
GeneralRules2.example: The game is played with 20 base bet for 10,000 ways, bet level of 1 to 10 and bet size of 0.01 to 10.

GRules.GeneralRules3: Free Spins Feature is played at the same bet size and bet level as the spin that triggered the Free Spins Feature.

GCommonRules.SymbolPrizeExplaination1: After the payout of every round is made, all winning symbols will explode allowing the symbols above them to cascade down for a new round.
GCommonRules.SymbolPrizeExplaination2: Additional winning combination will be tallied in every round until no more winning combination can be tallied.
GCommonRules.WildsExplaination1: Wild symbol substitutes for all symbols except Scatter symbol.

GMultiplier.Title: Multiplier
GMultiplier.MultiplierExplaination1: Any win in the second round will be multiplied by x2.
GMultiplier.MultiplierExplaination2: Any win in the third round will be multiplied by x3.
GMultiplier.MultiplierExplaination3: Any win in the fourth round will be multiplied by x5.
GMultiplier.MultiplierExplaination4: Any win in the fifth round will be multiplied by x8.
GMultiplier.MultiplierExplaination5: Any win in the sixth round will be multiplied by x10.
GMultiplier.MultiplierExplaination6: Any win in the seventh round (and beyond) will be multiplied by x15.

GFreeSpinRules.Title: Free Spins Feature
GFreeSpinRules.FreeSpinExplaination1: 3 Scatter symbols appearing anywhere will trigger the Free Spins Feature with 10 free spins. Each additional Scatter symbol will trigger 2 more free spins.
GFreeSpinRules.FreeSpinExplaination2: During free spins, any win in the second round will be multiplied by x3. All Red Treasure Egg symbols in second round (and beyond) will transform into Wild symbols.
GFreeSpinRules.FreeSpinExplaination3: During free spins, any win in the third round will be multiplied by x8. All Green Treasure Egg symbols in third round (and beyond) will transform into Wild symbols.
GFreeSpinRules.FreeSpinExplaination4: During free spins, any win in the fourth round (and beyond) will be multiplied by x15. All Blue Treasure Egg symbols in fourth round (and beyond) will transform into Wild symbols.

GMaximumWin.Title: Maximum Win
GMaximumWin.MaximumWinExplaination1: The maximum win amount is %{2500}x of the bet amount.
GMaximumWin.MaximumWinExplaination2: If the total win in the main game or the Free Spins Feature reaches %{2500}x of the bet amount, the spin ends.

GTreasureEggSymbol.Title: Treasure Egg Symbol
GTreasureEggSymbol.TreasureEggSymbolExplaination1: All Red Treasure Egg symbols in the third round (and beyond) will transform into Wild symbols.
GTreasureEggSymbol.TreasureEggSymbolExplaination2: All Green Treasure Egg symbols in fifth round (and beyond) will transform into Wild symbols.
GTreasureEggSymbol.TreasureEggSymbolExplaination3: All Blue Treasure Egg symbols in seventh round (and beyond) will transform into Wild symbols.
